Name: m15_1_ToneCorrectBank
Description: Determines the parameters for tone map corrections.

Fields.Name: Brightness %: R
Fields.Description: Multiplier to red component of the RGB color that corrects the brightness.

Fields.Name: Brightness %: G
Fields.Description: Multiplier to green component of the RGB color that corrects the brightness.

Fields.Name: Brightness %: B
Fields.Description: Multiplier to blue component of the RGB color that corrects the brightness.

Fields.Name: Contrast %: R
Fields.Description: Multiplier to red component of the RGB color that corrects the contrast.

Fields.Name: Contrast %: G
Fields.Description: Multiplier to green component of the RGB color that corrects the contrast.

Fields.Name: Contrast %: B
Fields.Description: Multiplier to blue component of the RGB color that corrects the contrast.

Fields.Name: Saturation %
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the value that corrects the saturation

Fields.Name: Hue %
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the value that corrects the hue

Fields.Name: Particle Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the amount of particles used.
